_publications._publicationTitle: Development of the PROMIS pediatric stigma and extension to the PROMIS pediatric stigma: skin item banks.

_contextSnippet: We then evaluated the magnitude of DIF impact...the impact was minimal, with most differences falling within 1 T-score (or 0.1 SD)
details: Successfully identified differential item functioning with minimal impact, with most differences falling within 1 T-score (0.1 SD)
